docket_entries.description: PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-04-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAGING STALLION STUDIOS INC. SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST EUGENE C. WHITE, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-04-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-19-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KAREN FARNSWORTH, CSR# 5162 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
